languages.text: {n}За вашей спиной раздается шум множества шагов. Прошедшие по расчищенному от ловушек пути, позади стоят наскоро перебинтованные техножрецы Декабалуса и сам артизан.{/n} "Благодарю: ваша помощь в разминировании пути была чрезвычайно эффективна — освободила пространство для маневра".

{n}You hear the sound of many footsteps over your shoulder. After traversing the now-cleared path, Decabalus's hastily bandaged Tech-Priests come to stand behind you, along with the Artisan himself.{/n} "Gratitude: your assistance in clearing the path of traps was extremely effective. It opened up room to manoeuvre."
languages.original_text: {n}За вашей спиной раздается шум множества шагов. Прошедшие по расчищенному от ловушек пути, позади стоят наскоро перебинтованные техножрецы Декабалуса и сам артизан.{/n} "Благодарю: ваша помощь в разминировании пути была чрезвычайно эффективна — освободила пространство для маневра".

languages.text: {n}背後から多くの足音が聞こえる。道を切り開いた後、急いで包帯を巻いたテクプリストたちが、そしてその職人であるデカバルスが、あなたたちを追い越してやってくる。{/n}「感謝：罠の道を切り開いてくれたお陰で、非常に効果的でした。」
languages.original_text: {n}You hear the sound of many footsteps over your shoulder. After traversing the now-cleared path, Decabalus's hastily bandaged Tech-Priests come to stand behind you, along with the Artisan himself.{/n} "Gratitude: your assistance in clearing the path of traps was extremely effective."

traits.locale_text: {n}背後から多くの足音が聞こえる。道を切り開いた後、急いで包帯を巻いたテクプリストたちが、そしてその職人であるデカバルスが、あなたたちを追い越してやってくる。{/n}「感謝：罠の道を切り開いてくれたお陰で、非常に効果的でした。」

languages.text: {n}你听到身后传来纷乱的脚步声。匠人德卡巴洛斯带着那些匆忙包扎过的技术神甫，穿过刚被清空的道路，站在了你身后。{/n}“感激：阁下清除路径陷阱的协助极为高效。”
languages.original_text: {n}You hear the sound of many footsteps over your shoulder. After traversing the now-cleared path, Decabalus's hastily bandaged Tech-Priests come to stand behind you, along with the Artisan himself.{/n} "Gratitude: your assistance in clearing the path of traps was extremely effective."

traits.locale_text: {n}你听到身后传来纷乱的脚步声。匠人德卡巴洛斯带着那些匆忙包扎过的技术神甫，穿过刚被清空的道路，站在了你身后。{/n}“感激：阁下清除路径陷阱的协助极为高效。”

languages.text: {n}Omzunun üzerinden birçok ayak sesi duyuyorsun. Artık temizlenmiş yoldan geçen Decabalus'un alelacele sarılmış Tekno Rahipleri, bizzat Zanaatkâr ile birlikte arkanda duruyor.{/n} "Minnettarlık: Yolu tuzaklardan temizleme konusundaki yardımınız son derece etkiliydi."
languages.original_text: {n}You hear the sound of many footsteps over your shoulder. After traversing the now-cleared path, Decabalus's hastily bandaged Tech-Priests come to stand behind you, along with the Artisan himself.{/n} "Gratitude: your assistance in clearing the path of traps was extremely effective."

traits.locale_text: {n}Omzunun üzerinden birçok ayak sesi duyuyorsun. Artık temizlenmiş yoldan geçen Decabalus'un alelacele sarılmış Tekno Rahipleri, bizzat Zanaatkâr ile birlikte arkanda duruyor.{/n} "Minnettarlık: Yolu tuzaklardan temizleme konusundaki yardımınız son derece etkiliydi."

languages.text: {n}Escuchas numerosos pasos por encima de tu hombro. Tras atravesar el camino que has despejado, Los sacerdotes vendados de Decabalus se colocan a tu lado, junto al propio artesano.{/n} «Agradecimiento: su ayuda al despejar las trampas del camino ha sido extremadamente eficaz».
languages.original_text: {n}You hear the sound of many footsteps over your shoulder. After traversing the now-cleared path, Decabalus's hastily bandaged Tech-Priests come to stand behind you, along with the Artisan himself.{/n} "Gratitude: your assistance in clearing the path of traps was extremely effective."

traits.locale_text: {n}Escuchas numerosos pasos por encima de tu hombro. Tras atravesar el camino que has despejado, Los sacerdotes vendados de Decabalus se colocan a tu lado, junto al propio artesano.{/n} «Agradecimiento: su ayuda al despejar las trampas del camino ha sido extremadamente eficaz».

languages.text: {n}Vous entendez des piétinements dans votre dos. Profitant du passage désormais dégagé, les technoprêtres de Décabalus viennent se placer derrière vous, accompagnés de l'artisan lui-même. Tous ont été bandés à la hâte.{/n} « Gratitude : votre aide pour dégager le passage a été extrêmement précieuse. »
languages.original_text: {n}You hear the sound of many footsteps over your shoulder. After traversing the now-cleared path, Decabalus's hastily bandaged Tech-Priests come to stand behind you, along with the Artisan himself.{/n} "Gratitude: your assistance in clearing the path of traps was extremely effective."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous entendez des piétinements dans votre dos. Profitant du passage désormais dégagé, les technoprêtres de Décabalus viennent se placer derrière vous, accompagnés de l'artisan lui-même. Tous ont été bandés à la hâte.{/n} « Gratitude : votre aide pour dégager le passage a été extrêmement précieuse. »

languages.text: {n}Du hörst hinter die das Geräusch vieler Schritte. Nachdem sie den jetzt freien Weg passiert haben, bleiben Decabalus' hastig bandagierte Techpriester und der Artifex selbst hinter dir stehen.{/n} "Dankbarkeit: Eure Unterstützung bei der Räumung des Pfades von Fallen war ausgesprochen effizient."
languages.original_text: {n}You hear the sound of many footsteps over your shoulder.
